entries.quote: This is the second offering that will unlock the potential of credit usage on UPI, following the tremendous success of Rupay Credit Cards on UPI… This offering will revolutionise the access and use of credit in the country.
entries.signal: PhonePe is deliberately sequencing UPI credit products, signalling a roadmap ambition to own the credit-on-UPI layer across all bank partners
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes UPI rails are sufficient to disintermediate traditional card networks for mainstream credit use cases
